content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break fixed reasoning ruts that occur when refining from a single starting output. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while unlocking higher performance on ambiguous tasks like open-ended code debugging and creative writing generation.
